notes: Rewards points are modeled separately from base prices, weekly ad deals, and coupons.
Account-specific reward balance, redeemed rewards, and product reward tiles should be captured from the Rewards dashboard as a future account-state layer.
Point values are planning estimates. Product reward tiles may beat cash-equivalent redemptions and should be compared against the current product price before redeeming.
metadata.account_state_storage: Account-specific rewards state belongs in ignored safeway_rewards_account_state.local.json.

grocery.source_note: Earn 1 point for every $1 spent on eligible groceries.

gift_cards.source_note: Earn 2 points for every $1 spent on eligible gift cards.

pharmacy.source_note: Earn 1 point for every $1 spent on qualifying pharmacy purchases.

earning_rules.expiration_note: Unused points normally expire within two calendar months, including the month earned. FreshPass subscribers may have different expiration behavior.

valuation.default_note: User-observed best cash-style grocery redemption: 1200 points for $20.

redemption_options.name: Automatic cash off
redemption_options.notes: Every 100 points automatically converts to $1 off when auto cash off is enabled.

redemption_options.name: $4 off groceries
redemption_options.notes: Official FAQ example of a tiered basket discount.

redemption_options.name: $15 off groceries
redemption_options.notes: Official FAQ example of a tiered basket discount.

redemption_options.name: $20 off groceries
redemption_options.notes: Planning default because it is the user's best observed cash-style grocery redemption.

redemption_options.name: Gas discount, max 25 gal fill
redemption_options.notes: 100 points equals $0.10 off per gallon at participating fuel stations. Value assumes the full 25 gallon maximum.
